Operation 'getGlobalmapClans' has semantic quality issues: vague_description, missing_input_details, missing_output_details, missing_context. Original description is too brief and lacks actionable details. Enhanced version specifies what data is returned, mentions filtering/pagination capabilities, clarifies the operational context (Clan Wars participation), and provides use cases to help AI agents determine when to invoke this operation.

data.current_description: Retrieve clan information from the Global Map.
data.summary_suggestion: Retrieve clans participating in Clan Wars
data.description_suggestion: Retrieves a list of clans currently participating in Clan Wars on the Global Map. Supports filtering and pagination through query parameters. Returns clan identifiers, names, tags, and their current Global Map status. Use this operation to discover active clans, monitor clan participation, or retrieve specific clan information for Clan Wars analysis.
data.reasoning: Original description is too brief and lacks actionable details. Enhanced version specifies what data is returned, mentions filtering/pagination capabilities, clarifies the operational context (Clan Wars participation), and provides use cases to help AI agents determine when to invoke this operation.

message: Operation 'getGlobalmapProvinces' has semantic quality issues: vague_description, missing_input_details, missing_output_details, missing_context. Original description mentions 'front' but lacks clarity on what data is returned and how to use it. Enhanced version specifies the returned data fields, clarifies the front parameter's role, mentions pagination support, and provides concrete use cases to improve AI agent interpretability and decision-making about when to call this operation.

data.current_description: Retrieve province information from the Global Map for a specific front.
data.summary_suggestion: Retrieve Global Map provinces for a specific front
data.description_suggestion: Retrieves province data from the Global Map for a specified front, including province identifiers, names, current owners, and territorial status. Supports filtering by front and pagination through query parameters. Returns detailed province information useful for analyzing territorial control, clan holdings, and Clan Wars map state. Use this operation to monitor territorial changes, identify strategic locations, or retrieve province details for Clan Wars analysis.
data.reasoning: Original description mentions 'front' but lacks clarity on what data is returned and how to use it. Enhanced version specifies the returned data fields, clarifies the front parameter's role, mentions pagination support, and provides concrete use cases to improve AI agent interpretability and decision-making about when to call this operation.

message: Operation 'searchAccounts' has semantic quality issues: vague_summary, missing_input_details, missing_output_details. Original summary is too generic. Description lacks clarity about what 'basic information' includes and doesn't explain the primary use case (name-to-ID resolution). Enhanced version specifies return fields and explains when an AI agent should use this operation.

data.current_description: Search for player accounts by name. Returns a list of matching accounts with basic information.
data.summary_suggestion: Search for player accounts by name
data.description_suggestion: Search for player accounts by name query. Returns a list of matching accounts with account ID and player name. Supports partial name matching. Useful for resolving player names to account IDs before retrieving detailed player statistics.
data.reasoning: Original summary is too generic. Description lacks clarity about what 'basic information' includes and doesn't explain the primary use case (name-to-ID resolution). Enhanced version specifies return fields and explains when an AI agent should use this operation.

message: Operation 'getAccountInfo' has semantic quality issues: vague_summary, missing_input_details. Summary 'Get player info' is too vague and doesn't indicate scope. Description lacks clarity about required inputs (account ID) and doesn't specify that statistics are aggregated. Enhanced version clarifies what 'detailed' means and specifies input requirements for AI agent clarity.
